content.fact_text: Implemented a production-ready Redis client wrapper using 'ioredis' and 'opossum' for caching and session management.

provenance_data.behaviour: Provides a singleton Redis client wrapper with connection pooling, automatic JSON serialization/deserialization, fault tolerance via Opossum circuit breaker, and health check capabilities.
interfaces: RedisClient.set(key: string, value: any, ttlSeconds?: number): Promise<void>
RedisClient.hset(key: string, field: string, value: any): Promise<void>
RedisClient.hget<T>(key: string, field: string): Promise<T | null>
provenance_data.utility: Provides a robust, fault-tolerant Redis interface for the ecommerce backend, essential for session management and performance caching.
